name: MindReply - Analytics Pipeline
description: Automated analytics collection and reporting with PostHog - tracks user behavior, revenue, retention

parameters.query: INSERT INTO daily_metrics (date, total_events, total_revenue, active_users) SELECT CURRENT_DATE, COUNT(*), SUM(revenue), COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM events WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURRENT_DATE ON CONFLICT (date) DO UPDATE SET total_events=EXCLUDED.total_events, total_revenue=EXCLUDED.total_revenue, active_users=EXCLUDED.active_users

parameters.subject: Daily Analytics Report - {{$json.totalRevenue | number: '1.2-2'}} revenue
